title: From C to JavaScript: Porting a Graphics Program
summary: How I took my CS1 hyperboloid renderer written in C and rebuilt it in vanilla JavaScript using the Canvas API — and what I learned about the differences between the two.

title: My First CTF: What I Got Wrong
summary: A honest look at my first Capture the Flag competition — the mistakes I made, the rabbit holes I fell into, and the one challenge I actually solved.

title: Building a Portfolio That Doesn't Look Like Every Other Portfolio
summary: Why I chose a terminal aesthetic, how I built the matrix boot loader, and the small details that make a personal site feel personal.
